meta.description: Personality, hobbies, site philosophy, and interests of Prasad Gade

data.who: Prasad Gade is a computer engineer and a data analyst who builds software, works with data, and creates intelligent tools to solve real problems.

site_philosophy.what: This is Prasad's digital home — an interactive, visual resume that also reflects his personality.
site_philosophy.who_is_it_for: Everyone. Recruiters, friends, colleagues, tech and non-tech people, or anyone curious about who Prasad is.
site_philosophy.why: Not created just to tick a box. Built because Prasad wanted to and enjoys it. The site gives a platform to demonstrate skills and interests.
site_philosophy.approach: Values simplicity, user empathy, and creativity. Includes a Start Here modal for non-tech visitors, resume opens in-app to retain people, and every UI detail is intentional.

site_features: 4 visual themes: dark, light, arcade dark, arcade light
No-scroll desktop layout (everything fits one screen)
3D Minecraft skin viewer using skinview3d and Three.js
Paper playground: screen turns into a crumpled paper with real cloth physics simulation
Hidden easter eggs: Konami code and hesoyam trigger animations
Start Here modal for non-tech visitors explaining all sections
Resume opens in an in-app modal (no redirect)
Responsive for mobile, tablet, and desktop-site-on-mobile
Every modal closes on ESC key

favorite_book.title: How to Win Friends and Influence People
favorite_book.author: Dale Carnegie

favorite_songs.name: Main Zindagi Ka Saath Nibhata Chala Gaya
